2309570.name: The Clown's Forest: Waking Shadows
2309570.description:
The Clown's Forest: Waking Shadows is a Story DLC to The Clown's Forest.

STORY
You play as 25-year-old Carla. Carla is a curious but intelligent individual who, along with her boyfriend James, goes to investigate Hartown Park, after the previous night where they found a young man, stumbling through the streets, jabbering on about a Clown in the forest, who had killed his friends.

After ensuring the man's safety, they both took the decision to go to the park to see if the man was telling the truth. The only thing they never asked the
man was his name... His name was Michael.

Gameplay Features:

Puzzles - Puzzles return from the base game with Carla at the helm. Can she use her wit to escape?

Highly Detailed Maps - Highly detailed maps return with no reused locations!

Compelling Cast of Characters - Characters have been written to feel alive and very realistic!

Intriguing Story - Help Carla find out if the stories of the park are true.

Chase Sequences - Blitzo doesn't take kindly to visitors, and due to the events of the base game, he is even more dangerous.

Combat - Use a pistol to protect Carla from threats common threats. Be wary, guns do not protect you from the clown.

Health - Carla can take damage from every enemy, check your surroundings... it is key to your survival

Multiple Endings - Everyone's Fate is in your hands, be careful what you choose.

Credits:

SilentWraith - Story, Gameplay, Level Design, Directing.

VisuStella - Plugins, Tilesets, Weather Effects, Sounds, Character Sprites.

Casper Gaming - Plugins

KADOKAWA - RPG Maker MZ Engine, Sounds.
2309570.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
